_comment: Fact-check sidecar template. Copy to <pack_filename>.factcheck.json next to the .md source. Fill EVERY claim category that appears in the pack. Sources MUST be primary (cruise-line press release, FAQ, Wikipedia ship article with citation, cruisedeckplans, cruise-industry-news). NEVER cite another pack in this repo. Update last_factcheck_date whenever the pack .md is edited. The pre-commit hook blocks if sidecar is missing, stale (older than .md mtime), or missing required categories.
verification_session: Brief note on the session that performed this audit

gross_tonnage.notes: <any discrepancy between sources, which was chosen and why>

crew.notes: DO NOT copy-paste from another pack. Per-ship verification required (the 1,388 crew copy-pasted across Aqua/Luna/Prima caused three errors in one trap).

sister_ships.notes: Verify the list is COMPLETE — missing siblings is a recurring error (Anthem pack initially omitted Odyssey, the 5th Quantum-class ship).

godparent.source: <primary URL — cruise line press release strongly preferred>
godparent.notes: HIGH-RISK CATEGORY. Verified failures: Prima 'Katarina Witt' (actually Katy Perry); Aqua missing godparent (Eric Stonestreet); ELLE 'from Napa, CA' (actually NYC/London).

selection_mechanism.value: <how the godparent was chosen, if relevant>
selection_mechanism.notes: Anthem pack 'chosen from general public' was wrong; Emma Wilby was from 'a search for travel agents who could sing.'

auto_gratuity_rate.notes: RATES CHANGE. Re-verify on every pack edit. RCL raised to $18.50/$21 (prior packs had $16); MSC raised to $17/$23 effective May 11 2026; NCL $20/$25.

wine_alcohol_policy.notes: RCL moved from per-stateroom to per-adult in March 2023; old per-stateroom phrasing is incorrect.

drink_package_name_and_pricing.notes: PACKAGE NAMES CHANGE. MSC retired Easy / Easy Plus (NA Dec 2024, global Aug 2025). NCL bundles via Free at Sea. Virgin bundles in fare. Verify the current name AND pricing every edit.

laundry_availability.value: <e.g., 'no self-service; full-service via cabin steward only'>
laundry_availability.notes: TRAP CATEGORY. RCL: DIY laundry is WORLD-CRUISE-ONLY. MSC: NO self-service fleet-wide. NCL: NO self-service fleet-wide. Virgin: NO self-service on Lady Class. Princess and HAL: yes self-service. Verify per-line per-ship.

app_naming.notes: RCL consolidated 'Royal IQ' into the unified app. NCL: 'NCL app' or 'Cruise Norwegian.' Verify current naming.

port_prices._comment: List each priced port-day claim with current source. Prices change with operator and season. Verify on every pack edit if the pack will sail more than 60 days out.

superlatives._comment: EVERY 'first at sea,' 'world's largest,' 'longest,' 'only,' 'best,' 'originally' claim in the pack body gets an entry here. If the claim cannot be sourced to the cruise line's own press release with a date, REMOVE THE SUPERLATIVE from the pack. The descriptive claim ('a three-level go-kart track') is almost always sufficient and always defensible.

<exact wording of the claim in the pack>.source: <primary URL or null if claim was removed>

specialty_dining_list.value: <list of specialty restaurants on this specific ship>
specialty_dining_list.source: <primary URL — ship-specific deck plan or cruise-line ship page>
specialty_dining_list.notes: Specialty venues vary by ship even within a class (Escape has Pincho Tapas; Bliss does not). Verify per-ship, not per-class.

included_dining_list.value: <list of fare-included venues on this specific ship>

indulge_food_hall_venues_if_applicable.notes: Naming has been wrong before: 'Q Texas Smokehouse' is the Breakaway Plus name; 'Texas Q Steakhouse' is the Prima-class name. 'Esagono' and 'Hexagon' are the SAME venue (Italian translation), not two separate ones.

current_homeport.notes: Year of deployment shift matters. Anthem moved to Alaska in 2025, not 2024 as one pack had it.

drydocks.notes: TRAP. Anthem pack invented a '2018 drydock' that never happened — Anthem's first major drydock was March 2025 Singapore (April 2020 was cancelled due to COVID). If you cannot find a drydock in a cruise-industry source, it did not happen.

port_hours.source: <URL to cruise line itinerary or operator confirmation>
port_hours.notes: Port hours vary per sailing. Frame as 'typical' unless the cruise line has published this sailing's specific times.
